## Installation

### Binary (recommended)

Download the archive for your platform from the assets below and extract:

```bash
tar xzf taskit-v${version}-${target}.tar.gz
mv taskit /usr/local/bin/
```

### Cargo

```bash
cargo install taskit@${version}
```
